# AccessTokenUsage.UrlContainsAccessTokenInQuery method

Returns `true` when a URL carries an `access_token` in its query string, which a client MUST NOT do (R-23.8-c).

```csharp
public static bool UrlContainsAccessTokenInQuery(string requestUrl)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| requestUrl | The request URL to inspect. |

## Return Value

`true` when an `access_token` query parameter is present.
